items.title: Iran launches more strikes after accusing US of striking near nuclear plant
items.summary: Centcom says it hit 90 Iranian targets in the latest round of strikes, with the Iranian health ministry saying 14 people were killed since Tuesday.

items.title: Oregon Records 5 Years of Zero Pesticide-Related Deaths in Bees
items.summary: According to an inaugural report on the health of bees in Oregon, scientists at Oregon State University have found no incidences of pesticide-related bee deaths since 2021. This significant achievemen…
